title: Break My Fall
description: Adds configurable features related to falling and fall damage like breaking snow on impact or taking fall damage in different water depths!
body:
# About
- Break My Fall originally known as Configurable Falls is a mod that adds many different features related to fall damage and falling in Minecraft and makes all the features in this mod modifiable by a config!
- You can modify all features in this mod by a config to provide the best experience possible!
- You can join my discord server to report bugs, make suggestions and see sneak peaks for future content! https://discord.gg/RD6ZKdcckv

I plan on updating this mod to new versions and adding new features!

[**1.16.5 & 1.12.2** is now **discontinued** and will **no longer recieve updates**]


# Features
Not all of these features are turned on by default.

- You can make Water deal fall damage to entities and modify the fall damage percentage at different Water Depths!
- You can also modify the fall distance required for entities to take fall damage in Water!
- You can make Ice break when an entity falls on it and modify the fall distance required to make the Ice break!
- You can modify how much fall damage an entity takes when landing on Hay Bales!
- You can make melons explode into melon slices on fall and modify the fall distance required to make the melon explode.
- You can make suspicious blocks break on fall and modify the fall distance required to break these fragile treasure blocks!
- You can make glass and glass panes break on fall and modify the fall distance required to shatter these blocks!
- You can make snow layers melt on fall and modify the fall distance required to melt these blocks!
- You can make grass blocks turn to dirt on fall and modify the fall distance required to kill the grass!
- You can make grass foliage break on fall and modify the fall distance required to wither these foliage!
- You can make flowers break on fall and modify the fall distance required to break these precious flowers!

# Credits
[EiraEnder](https://x.com/eiraender) (texture artist)
